case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC.

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT INITIAL FILING FEE PAID BY DEFENDANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC. $30,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
